summary: Completed testing of SEO text generation feature with Gemini Flash. All 13 backend API tests passed. Frontend Admin SEO Gen page and Company page with AI description working correctly. Minor issue: duplicate meta description tags on company pages.

issues: Duplicate meta description tags - index.html default appears before Helmet-generated AI description. Search engines may use the generic description instead of AI-generated one.

backend_api: GET /api/admin/seo-gen/status - Returns 200 with running, total_with_seo (7), total_active (~2.3M), remaining counts
GET /api/admin/seo-gen/status - Requires admin auth (401/403 without token)
GET /api/admin/seo-gen/preview/2113693 - Generates SEO text for company (does NOT save)
POST /api/admin/seo-gen/start - Starts batch generation with limit=2, concurrency=1
GET /api/company/cui/1860712 - Returns seo_description field when present
frontend_ui: Admin SEO Gen page (/admin/seo-gen) loads with stats cards
Stats show: 2,310,376 active, 7 with SEO, 2,310,369 remaining
Control panel with Paralelism (1-10) and Limită inputs visible
Preview section with CUI input and Generate button visible
Sidebar shows 'Generare Texte AI' under SEO menu
Company page (CUI 1860712) displays AI SEO description in dedicated section
Company page shows financial data correctly

action_items: MINOR: Remove default meta description from /app/frontend/public/index.html to allow Helmet to properly set page-specific descriptions. Currently there are duplicate meta description tags.
critical_code_review_comments: SEO generation routes properly implement admin-only access with role check
Batch processing uses asyncio background task with proper semaphore for concurrency control
Preview endpoint correctly does NOT save to database (preview only)
Company API correctly returns seo_description field when present
CompanyPage.js correctly displays AI description and uses it for meta (but index.html default interferes)
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - 7 companies already have seo_description from previous batch runs
context_for_next_testing_agent: SEO text generation feature fully tested. Backend routes in /app/backend/routes/seo_gen_routes.py. Admin page at /admin/seo-gen. 7 companies have AI-generated SEO descriptions. CUI 1860712 (ROMPETROL RAFINARE SA) and CUI 2113693 have seo_description. Gemini API key configured in backend .env. Minor issue: duplicate meta description tags on company pages due to default in index.html.

mocked_apis.stripe_checkout: Stripe payments are MOCKED (as noted in review request)
